allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('src/components/ui/index.jsx','utf8'\); console.log\('Lines:', code.split\('\\n'\).length, '| SearchableSelect exported:', code.includes\('export function SearchableSelect'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='instructors' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows.map\(c=>c.column_name+' \('+c.data_type+'\)'\).join\('\\n'\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows.map\(c=>c.column_name+' \('+c.data_type+'\)'\).join\('\\n'\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT unnest\(enum_range\(NULL::user_role\)\) AS role\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\('roles:', r.rows.map\(x=>x.role\).join\(', '\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ pool.query\(\\"SELECT unnest\(enum_range\(NULL::role_enum\)\) AS role\\"\).then\(r2=>{ console.log\('roles:', r2.rows.map\(x=>x.role\).join\(', '\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e2=>{ console.error\(e.message, e2.message\); pool.end\(\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT u.id, u.email, u.role, u.status, i.doctor_number FROM users u JOIN instructors i ON i.user_id = u.id WHERE u.role = 'professor' LIMIT 5\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")
